title: David Delainey
compiled_truth: David Delainey is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-31), David Delainey sent 1566 and received 1326 emails, totalling 2892 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (248), [Kay Chapman](people/kay-chapman) (198), [Janet Dietrich](people/janet-dietrich) (154), [Mark Frevert](people/mark-frevert) (124), [Wes Colwell](people/wes-colwell) (123). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_plan, _americas, _sent_mail, deleted_items, discussion_threads, inbox.
